StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(mi_idx.info) AS rating, MIN(t.title) AS northern_dark_movie FROM job.info_type AS it1, job.info_type AS it2, job.keyword AS k, job.kind_type AS kt, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.title AS t WHERE it1.info = 'countries' AND it2.info = 'rating' AND k.keyword IN ('murder', 'murder-in-title', 'blood', 'violence') AND kt.kind = 'movie' AND mi.info IN ('Sweden', 'Norway', 'Germany', 'Denmark', 'Swedish', 'Denish', 'Norwegian', 'German', 'USA', 'American') AND mi_idx.info < '8.5' AND t.production_year > 2010 AND kt.id = t.kind_id AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND k.id = mk.keyword_id AND it1.id = mi.info_type_id AND it2.id = mi_idx.info_type_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='blood' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='murder' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='murder-in-title' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='violence'

([dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='American' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denish' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denmark' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='German' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Germany' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norway' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norwegian' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Sweden' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Swedish' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='USA') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1457],[dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info_type_id] as [mi].[info_type_id])
